benign_tumor: Displays features highly suspicious for malignancy, often including irregular, ill-defined, or spiculated margins; heterogeneous internal echotexture; hypoechoic appearance with posterior acoustic shadowing; and potential evidence of local invasion or increased, chaotic vascularity.
A malignant tumor on ultrasound often appears as an irregular, poorly defined mass with heterogeneous internal structure.
Malignant tumors may show spiculated margins and invade surrounding breast tissue.
The image reveals a suspicious lesion with features typical of breast cancer.
Malignant tumors often have increased vascularity and may cause posterior acoustic shadowing.
malignant_tumor: Displays features highly suspicious for malignancy, often including irregular, ill-defined, or spiculated margins; heterogeneous internal echotexture; hypoechoic appearance with posterior acoustic shadowing; and potential evidence of local invasion or increased, chaotic vascularity.
A malignant tumor on ultrasound often appears as an irregular, poorly defined mass with heterogeneous internal structure.
Malignant tumors may show spiculated margins and invade surrounding breast tissue.
The image reveals a suspicious lesion with features typical of breast cancer.
Malignant tumors often have increased vascularity and may cause posterior acoustic shadowing.
normal_scan: Demonstrates normal anatomical structures and expected findings, with no sonographic evidence of pathology.
This ultrasound scan shows healthy breast tissue with no abnormal findings.
A normal scan reveals no masses, lesions, or suspicious features in the breast tissue.
The image displays typical breast anatomy without any signs of disease.
No evidence of tumors or abnormal growths is present in this normal scan.
